title: murdannia scapiflora
intro: Murdannia scapiflora, also known as the blue day flower or blue dayflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Commelinaceae. It is native to Asia and is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Murdannia scapiflora include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Murdannia scapiflora can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
